error_signature: workflow completed successfully but didn't finish the loop
title: Loop processing halted due to missing return in code node
symptom: The workflow indicates completion, but not all items in the loop are processed. The last processed item is shown, but the next iteration does not start.
applies_when: Using a loop in the workflow
Code node is part of the loop
not_this_if: All items in the loop are processed successfully
root_cause: The code node did not return any data, which is necessary for the merge node to function correctly. Without a return value, the workflow cannot proceed to the next iteration of the loop.
fix_steps: Ensure the code node returns data at the end of its execution.
Consider placing the loop logic inside a subflow using the execute workflow node.
Set the execute workflow node to always return an item.
agent_instruction: Modify the code node to ensure it always returns data to continue the loop.
